news.summary: Mustang Energy Corp. has disclosed the findings of the Airborne MobileMT Survey conducted at their Yellowstone Project in Saskatchewan. Key results from the survey show promising discoveries in electrical conductivity within the region. This comprehensive assessment covered approximately X square kilometers and indicated significant anomalies in the conductivity levels, with values ranging from X to Y Siemens. The data provides essential insights for potential resource exploration and development at the Yellowstone Project.
news.headline: Mustang Energy Corp. reports findings from mobileMT survey at Yellowstone Project in Saskatchewan.

news.summary: Waterstone Financial, Inc., based in Wauwatosa, Wisconsin, revealed on April 17, 2025, that Michael Hansen will be retiring from his position as Director at the Company and its wholly-owned subsidiary, WaterStone Bank SSB.
news.headline: Waterstone Financial in Wis. announced Director Michael Hansen's retirement from the company and its subsidiary WaterStone Bank SSB on Apr 17, 2025.

news.summary: Companies such as Strategy, Tesla, and Coinbase have collectively acquired billions of dollars in Bitcoin, solidifying their positions as major players in the cryptocurrency market. With significant investments in the digital asset, these entities emerge as the top whales in the industry.
news.headline: Top 10 companies hold billions in Bitcoin, including Strategy, Tesla, and Coinbase. They are major players in the crypto market.

news.summary: In Plymouth, Wisconsin on April 17, 2025, the premium ready-to-drink (RTD) cocktail brand, Carbliss, celebrated its recent expansion into Kentucky. This move marks a significant milestone in the brand's rapid growth trajectory. Carbliss officially entered the Bluegrass State last week, solidifying its presence in the region. This expansion signifies a pivotal moment for the company as it continues its upwards trajectory, having now established a solid foothold in Kentucky.
news.headline: Carbliss, the #4 selling RTD cocktail in the nation, expanded into Kentucky last week, continuing its rapid growth.

news.summary: On May 9-10, 2025 in Hackensack, New Jersey, an event will be held to celebrate Salvador Dalí's birthday, organized by Facticerie. Facticerie, known for having the world's largest collection of perfume factices, will host a two-day event named "The Scent of Salvador Dalí." The event promises a fantastical experience for guests, paying tribute to the renowned surrealist artist. The celebration will include various activities and exhibits related to Dalí's life and work, providing a unique opportunity for attendees to immerse themselves in the world of surrealism.
news.headline: Facticerie in Hackensack, NJ presents "The Scent of Dalí" immersive experience celebrating Salvador Dalí's birthday on May 9-10, 2025.

news.summary: In the latest economic report, it was revealed that the unemployment rate dropped to 4.2%, the lowest it has been in five years. This decrease in unemployment is attributed to the creation of 250,000 new jobs in the last quarter. Additionally, the stock market saw a 10% increase in overall value, reaching a record high of 35,000 points. Experts believe that these positive indicators reflect a growing and robust economy.
news.headline: Token value drops 90%, highlighting crypto market volatility.

news.summary: FYARRO has significant market potential, especially for treating rare and aggressive cancers such as PEComa. PEComa currently has limited treatment options available, making FYARRO the first FDA-approved therapy for advanced cases. This highlights the critical unmet need in the field. The news was reported from Las Vegas on April 17, 2025.
news.headline: FYARRO, the first FDA-approved therapy for advanced PEComa, shows strong growth prospects in treating rare cancers.

news.summary: The newly launched medication TRYVIO, known as aprocitentan in the US and JERAYGO in Europe, has shown promising market potential as a groundbreaking treatment for patients with hypertension that is not effectively managed by current therapies. Since receiving FDA approval in March 2024, TRYVIO has been made available for commercial purchase starting from October 2024. This innovative therapy offers hope to a substantial number of individuals struggling with uncontrolled hypertension, providing a much-needed alternative in the healthcare landscape.
news.headline: TRYVIO (aprocitentan) and JERAYGO are new treatments for resistant hypertension; TRYVIO FDA-approved, available since October 2024.

news.summary: WISeKey International Holding Ltd announced their audited financial results for 2024, including a $90.6 million cash balance and $11.9 million in revenue. The company outlined its strategic vision for 2025, focusing on the convergence of technologies like semiconductors, satellites, blockchain, and digital identity. They highlighted various achievements in 2024, including partnerships with SpaceX and the Swiss Army, and developments in post-quantum chips and quantum-resistant technology. WISeKey anticipates strong growth in 2025 driven by investments in high-growth areas and a pipeline of secured business opportunities totaling $115 million from 2026 to 2028. The company plans to launch new products like Quantum-Resistant chips in 2025 and expand its global presence through partnerships and acquisitions. Subsidiaries SEALSQ and WISeSat are working on advancing post-quantum cryptography and secure space capabilities, while initiatives like SEALCOIN and WISeID aim to strengthen digital trust ecosystems. The company filed its annual report and will host a conference call on April 22, 2025. These developments position WISeKey at the forefront of key transformations in the digital space, driving growth and innovation in the coming years.
news.headline: WISeKey released its 2024 audited financial results, with $90.6M cash balance, $11.9M revenue, and a strategic vision for 2025 emphasizing convergence in technologies. Key initiatives include post-quantum chip development, satellite launches, and blockchain integration. For 2025, expecting growth in post-quantum cybersecurity, semiconductors, and more investments. Subsidiary SEALSQ focuses on post-quantum cryptography, targeted acquisitions, R&D, and expanding trust services. WISeKey also highlights plans for semiconductor personalization center, satellite expansion, and partnerships in various sectors. Quarterly earnings, alongside additional operational data, and a conference call planned for April 22, 2025, to review results. Full report available at www.wisekey.com.

news.summary: In Montreal on April 17, 2025, D-BOX Technologies Inc. revealed that Marie-Claude Boisvert has stepped down from the Board of Directors due to personal motives. Appointed as director in September 2024, Ms. Boisvert's resignation comes after serving a tenure of approximately 7 months. D-BOX Technologies Inc. is listed on the Toronto Stock Exchange under the symbol DBO.
news.headline: D-BOX Technologies Inc. (TSX: DBO) announces resignation of director, Marie-Claude Boisvert, for personal reasons.

news.summary: Fort Worth, TX - On April 17, 2025, American Airlines Group Inc. disclosed that Kathryn Farmer has been nominated by its board of directors for election to the company’s board at the upcoming annual meeting of stockholders on June 11, 2025. If elected, Farmer will become a member of the board of directors and will be assigned to the Finance Committee and Safety Committee. American Airlines Group Inc. is listed on the NASDAQ under the ticker symbol AAL.
news.headline: American Airlines nominates Kathryn Farmer to board at upcoming annual meeting on June 11, 2025. Farmer to join Finance & Safety Committees.

news.summary: MGP Ingredients, Inc., a prominent supplier of branded spirits and food ingredients, will disclose its first quarter earnings for 2025 on May 1 at 10 a.m. ET. The results encompassing the period ending March 31 will be made public before the market opens. The announcement will be led by interim President and CEO, Brandon Gall, alongside CFO Mark Davidson and Corporate Controller and Head of Treasury. Traded as Nasdaq: MGPI, the company is anticipated to reveal crucial financial insights during this reporting.
news.headline: MGP Ingredients (Nasdaq: MGPI) to report Q1 2025 financial results on May 1, 2025 at 10 a.m. ET; Management to discuss.

news.summary: Comstock Holding Companies, Inc. revealed that Starbucks will be launching a new 1,800-square-foot store at 22114 Gramercy Park Drive in Ashburn, Virginia, next to the BLVD lobby in Loudoun Station. This move signifies a significant development in the region for Comstock, a major player in mixed-use and transit-oriented properties around Washington, D.C. The location is set to open later this year and aims to cater to the local community with the popular coffeehouse chain known nationwide. This expansion marks an exciting addition to Loudoun S, creating more opportunity for growth and engagement.
news.headline: Starbucks to open new 1,800 sq ft location at 22114 Gramercy Park Drive in Ashburn, Virginia. Set to open later this year.

news.summary: WISeKey has disclosed its audited financial results for the year 2024 and highlighted its vision for post-quantum technology convergence in 2025. The company has scheduled a conference call and webcast on Tuesday, April 22 at 10:00 am Eastern Time (4:00 pm Central European Time). Investors can access this event to gain insights into the company's performance and future strategies related to cutting-edge technology.
news.headline: WISeKey presents 2024 results, 2025 plan for Post Quantum Technology, sets conference on April 22 at 10 am ET (4 pm CET).

news.summary: In an announcement made on April 17, 2025, in New Castle, Delaware, IgniteData, a key player in facilitating eSource to sponsor compatibility in clinical research, has welcomed Dr. Jose Galvez, MD, as the new Chief Medical Information Officer (CMIO). Dr. Galvez, who previously served as the Deputy Director of the FDA, brings valuable expertise to IgniteData's team.
news.headline: IgniteData names Dr. Jose Galvez as CMIO to boost clinical data innovation. Former FDA Deputy Director brings expertise.

news.summary: In Austin, Texas, One Model, a leading People Analytics platform for enterprise HR teams, emerged as a double champion at the prestigious 2025 HR Tech Awards, hosted by Lighthouse Research & Advisory alongside UNLEASH. The company claimed top honors in two categories: Best Advance in Practical AI (Core HR/Workforce) and Best Analytics, Measurement, and Business Impact Solution (Talent Analytics). Celebrating innovative solutions that deliver tangible results, One Model shone brightly in a competitive field.
news.headline: One Model wins two awards at 2025 HR Tech Awards in Austin, Texas: Best AI and Best Analytics solutions.

news.summary: On April 17, 2025, students hailing from Woodland Park, Colorado, are set to engage in a unique opportunity as they virtually interact with NASA astronaut Nichole Ayers. From her location aboard the International Space Station, Ayers will provide responses to prerecorded inquiries concerning science, technology, engineering, and mathematics (STEM) topics. The session is scheduled to last 20 minutes.
news.headline: NASA astronaut Nichole Ayers will answer STEM questions from students in Woodland Park, Colorado, via a 20-minute video.

news.summary: Hidden Road, a prime brokerage firm acquired by Ripple for $1.25 billion, has obtained a broker-dealer license from FINRA to expand its fixed-income market presence. This move allows Hidden Road to enhance its services for institutional clients with $10 billion daily transactions across more than 300 clients. With a focus on compliance and investor protection, the acquisition aligns with Ripple's goals of expanding its use cases into traditional financial markets. The regulatory environment in the U.S. has been supportive, as evidenced by Ripple's recent license acquisitions in Texas and New York, and the SEC dropping its lawsuit against the company. The acquisition signifies a significant milestone for both Hidden Road and Ripple as they aim to become the largest non-bank prime broker globally.
news.headline: Hidden Road, bought by Ripple for $1.25B, gets FINRA registration boost. Clearing $10B daily, it eyes growth in fixed-income market.
Hawaiian flight attendants ratify extending contract
Bloomberg reports on Materials Sector & Industry Performance. Stay informed on key numbers and trends.

news.summary: In Roseville, California on April 17, 2025, Gallelli Real Estate, a prominent independent full-service commercial real estate firm in Northern California, is experiencing growth by welcoming two of the highest-performing brokers in the Sacramento area. Esteemed industry professionals Rick Phillips and the other individual are now part of the team.
news.headline: Rick Phillips and Ed Benoit, prominent commercial real estate veterans, join Gallelli Real Estate, boosting its growth in Northern California.

news.summary: On April 17, 2025, Sotera Health Company (Nasdaq: SHC), a top provider of sterilization solutions and healthcare advisory services globally, revealed plans to disclose its first-quarter financial performance up to March 31, 2025, prior to the market opening on May 1, 2025. A conference call discussing the outcomes and operational achievements is scheduled by management at 9:00 a.m. Eastern Daylight Time on the same day.
news.headline: Sotera Health (Nasdaq: SHC) to release Q1 financial results on May 1, 2025. Conference call at 9:00 a.m. EDT.
Aja Health and Wellness Inc. announces delay in filing annual financial statements.

news.summary: In Lowell, Massachusetts, on April 17, 2025, Enterprise Bancorp, Inc. shared its financial performance for the first quarter of 2025. The company, which is the parent of Enterprise Bank and trades on NASDAQ under the symbol EBTC, reported a net income of $10.4 million. This translates to $0.84 per diluted common share for the quarter ending March 31, 2025. In comparison, the net income was $10.7 million ($0.86 per diluted common share) for the quarter ending December 31, 2024, and $8.5 million ($0.69 per diluted common share) for the quarter ending March 31, 2024.
news.headline: Enterprise Bancorp reports Q1 net income of $10.4 million, decrease from previous quarter; $0.84 per share.

news.summary: An exclusive opportunity awaits for those aspiring to attend the Met Gala, as they now have a chance to be part of the Museum Hack's Hacked Gala event at The Metropolitan Museum of Art in New York. The fundraising tour, inspired by the 2025 Met Gala theme "Superfine," promises an unforgettable experience. Scheduled for April 17, 2025, this event will offer a unique peek into the glamour of the iconic Met Gala, with invitations open to all. This innovative event is set to showcase the best of art and fashion, with a focus on raising funds for a noble cause.
news.headline: Museum Hack hosts Hacked Gala at the Met in NYC, offering a rebellious art fundraising tour. Attendees get a taste of the Met Gala experience.

news.summary: Sets aside funds for potential liabilities related to BMI OldCo's Chapter 11 bankruptcy case. Also, reports initial financial results for the first quarter of 2025.
news.headline: Minerals Tech. Inc. reports updated on subsidiary's Chapter 11 case and Q1 2025 results, including reserve for BMI OldCo.

news.summary: In Toronto, Granite Real Estate Investment Trust (GRT.UN on TSX, GRP.U on NYSE) declared a distribution of CDN $0.2833 per unit for April 2025. The payout date is set for May 15, 2025, for unitholders on record as of market close on April 30, 2025. This distribution does not include any effectively connected income for U.S. federal tax purposes.
news.headline: Granite REIT declares CDN $0.2833/unit distribution for April 2025, to be paid on May 15, 2025. No U.S. tax.

news.summary: The Board of Directors of United Security Bancshares, the parent company of United Security Bank, announced their operating results for the quarter ended March 31, 2025. For more details, the full release can be accessed through UBFO Investor Relations website. Founded in 1987, United Security Bancshares (NASDAQ: UBFO) is the holding company for United Security Bank.
news.headline: United Security Bancshares reports Q1 2025 earnings for United Security Bank. Visit UBFO Investor Relations for full release. Founded in 1987.

news.summary: In the latest update on the global pandemic, it has been reported that there are now over 5.6 million confirmed cases of COVID-19 worldwide. The death toll has surpassed 350,000, with over 2.3 million people having recovered from the virus. The United States remains the most affected country, with over 1.6 million confirmed cases and more than 95,000 deaths. Countries around the world continue to implement measures to curb the spread of the virus and support those affected by the pandemic.
news.headline: Cryptocurrency token plunges by 90%, demonstrating typical volatility in the crypto market.

news.summary: On April 17, 2025, the Brazilian company Companhia Brasileira de Distribuição, also known as GPA and listed on B3 under the ticker PCAR3, revealed its plan to submit a Form 15F to the U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission ("SEC"). This form aims to end the registration of its common shares and American...
news.headline: Brazilian company GPA plans to deregister from US SEC under the Securities Exchange Act of 1934.

news.summary: Dallas, on April 17, 2025, the board of directors at Texas Instruments Incorporated (Nasdaq: TXN) announced a quarterly cash dividend of $1.36 per common stock share. This dividend will be paid out on May 13, 2025, to shareholders on record as of April 30, 2025. Texas Instruments is a renowned company in the tech industry.
news.headline: Texas Instruments board declares quarterly dividend of $1.36/share, payable on May 13, 2025 to stockholders of record on April 30.

news.summary: Acadian Timber Corp, based in Edmundston, N.B., is set to announce its first-quarter results for 2025 on May 7. The report will be published on their website, www.acadiantimber.com/financial-information, following the market close. A conference call and webcast are scheduled for May 8 at 1:00 p.m. (Eastern Time) to review the financial and operational performance. Members of senior management will be leading the discussion. Stay tuned for the detailed financial figures and insights into the company's progress.
news.headline: Acadian Timber Corp. to discuss 2025 first quarter results on May 8, 2025, following release on May 7. 1-800-XXX-XXXX

news.summary: In Jacksonville, Florida, Dun & Bradstreet Holdings, Inc. (NYSE: DNB), a prominent global provider of business decisioning data and analytics, disclosed its plan to reveal the financial results for the first quarter of 2025 on Thursday, May 1, 2025, at around 7:30 a.m. Eastern Time through a press release. The report will be accessible on Dun & Bradstreet’s Investor Relations website at https://investor.dnb.com. This announcement comes amidst a proposed transaction that was recently announced.
news.headline: Dun & Bradstreet to report Q1 2025 financial results on May 1, 2025 at 7:30 a.m. Eastern Time. Website: https://investor.dnb.com.

news.summary: Diodes Incorporated (Nasdaq: DIOD) is set to conduct a conference call on May 8, 2025, at 4:00 p.m. CT (5:00 p.m. ET) to review its financial performance for the first quarter of 2025. Attending the call will be Gary Yu, President of Diodes Inc., alongside Brett Whitmire, CFO, and Emily Yang, Senior VP of Worldwide Sales and Marketing. The company plans to release its first quarter 2025 financial results on that day.
news.headline: Diodes Inc. (Nasdaq: DIOD) to reveal Q1 2025 financial results on May 8, 2025, during 4:00 p.m. CT call. Key execs to join.

news.summary: In Oakdale, California on April 17, 2025, Oak Valley Community Bank, a subsidiary of Oak Valley Bancorp (NASDAQ: OVLY), revealed the promotions of Greg Mulder to Vice President, Commercial Banking Officer and John Westberg to Assistant Vice President, Commercial Banking Officer. Mulder operates from the Escalon Office, while Westberg is located in Oakdale.
news.headline: Oak Valley Community Bank promotes Greg Mulder to VP and John Westberg to AVP in Commercial Banking.
